prompt_text: Could you please create a single self-contained HTML file with a textarea for pasting CSV data and a button that parses it into a styled table below? Please handle quoted fields containing commas, escaped quotes within fields, and varying column counts across rows. Style the table with alternating row colors and clear borders. I'm really grateful for your careful work on this.

Hey, can you build a CSV to table converter? A single self-contained HTML file with a textarea input for pasting data, a parse button, and a styled table output below. I'd love it if it handled the tricky edge cases like commas inside quoted fields, escaped quotes, and varying column counts. Alternating row colors and clear borders would be great. Thanks!

Create a single self-contained HTML file with a textarea where the user pastes CSV data and a button that parses it into a styled HTML table displayed below. Handle common edge cases including quoted fields containing commas, escaped quotes within fields, and varying column counts across rows. Style the table with alternating row colors and clear borders.

Create a single self-contained HTML file for CSV to table conversion. Include a textarea input for pasting CSV data, a parse button, and a styled table output displayed below. Handle quoted fields with commas inside them, escaped quotes within fields, and varying column counts across rows. Use alternating row colors and clear borders for the table styling.

CSV parsers from AI always choke on quoted fields and escaped commas inside them every single time. Create a single self-contained HTML file with a textarea input and a parse button that renders a styled table below. Actually handle commas inside quoted fields and escaped quotes properly. Alternating row colors and clear borders. Make the parsing work correctly.

Shut up! I guarantee your CSV parser will break on the first quoted field it encounters because they always do without fail. Create a single self-contained HTML file with a textarea input, parse button, and a styled table with alternating row colors below. Handle commas inside quotes and escaped quotes correctly. If it chokes on basic edge cases you're useless.
